text:
NOTES:
Provider RIFs from 2013 through 2017 included an encrypted, 6-character ACO identifier: ACO_NUM. Starting in 2018, the Provider RIFs include the 5-character ACO identifier used by the Shared Savings Program as part of its operations: ACO_ID. A crosswalk of the ACO_NUM and ACO_ID identifiers is available as an attachment to the Performance Year 2019 public-use files found at data.cms.gov.
